debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in 0..Real.pi, sin x * f (cos x) = ∫ (y : ℝ) in -1..1, f y

proof:
rw [integral_of_le pi_pos.le, integral_of_le (by norm_num : (-1 : ℝ) ≤ 1)]
  rw [← integral_Icc_eq_integral_Ioc, ← integral_Icc_eq_integral_Ioc, ← Real.bijOn_cos.image_eq]
  rw [integral_image_eq_integral_deriv_smul_of_antitone measurableSet_Icc (fun x _ ↦ (hasDerivAt_cos x).hasDerivWithinAt) Real.strictAntiOn_cos.antitoneOn]
  simp
successful_attempts:
rw [integral_of_le pi_pos.le, integral_of_le (by norm_num : (-1 : ℝ) ≤ 1)]
  rw [← integral_Icc_eq_integral_Ioc, ← integral_Icc_eq_integral_Ioc, ← Real.bijOn_cos.image_eq]
  rw [integral_image_eq_integral_deriv_smul_of_antitone measurableSet_Icc (fun x _ ↦ (hasDerivAt_cos x).hasDerivWithinAt) Real.strictAntiOn_cos.antitoneOn]
  simp
